description: Modify the properties of an edge. In the current building block set the edge with ID i will be modified.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: control-point
keywords.description: Modify control points of the edge. Must be followed by an 'add', 'delete', 'move', 'rotate', 'select', or 'translate' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: control-point-add
keywords.description: Add a control point at the position defined by vector v . The position v must be on the edge within the tolerance (see building-blocks set tolerance ).

keywords.name: control-point-delete
keywords.description: Delete the control point defined by index i from the edge. Index i is a positive integer starting from 1 . The 'index' keyword is required.

keywords.name: control-point-move
keywords.description: Move the control point defined by index i to a new position defined by vector v . The vector comes first, then the 'index' keyword and index.

keywords.name: control-point-rotate
keywords.description: Rotate control points of the edge defined by indices using an angle of rotation f (in degrees) around the axis of rotation defined by the origin point v_1 and direction vector v_2 . The keyword order is strict: origin, direction, angle, indices.

keywords.name: control-point-select
keywords.description: Select the control point(s) on the edge (no further arguments).

keywords.name: control-point-translate
keywords.description: Translate control points identified by indices by adding v to each position.

keywords.name: ratio
keywords.description: Specify a ratio size parameter f for zones on the edge. The ratio parameter f is a float number that must be between 0.1 and 10.0. When zones are generated from the blocks, the ratio defines zones relatively along the edge of the block. The size of each zone will be f of the previous zone length. The default value is 1.0 (uniform zones — same length). Each time the ratio of an edge is changed, the changes are propagated to all face-connected opposite edges. If ratio-isolate is set to true the changes will not propagate from the edge; the default setting for this flag is false (meaning the ratio setting propagates).

keywords.name: ratio-isolate
keywords.description: Set a flag to isolate ratio or factor assignments on an edge. If true then ratio/factor assignments do not propagate to all face-connected opposite edges. This setting is set to false by default.

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Specify the number of zones on an edge. The value of i must be positive (up to 1000). The default value is 3 . When zones are generated from the building blocks set, all blocks attached to this edge will be have i zones along the direction defined by the edge. Each time size of an edge is changed, the changes are propagated to face-connected opposite edges.

keywords.name: type
keywords.description: Specify the curve-type of the edge. Must be followed by an 'arc', 'polyline', or 'spline' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: type-arc
keywords.description: Specify an arc edge. An arc may have one control point only.

keywords.name: type-polyline
keywords.description: Specify a polyline edge (this is the default type ).
